notes: Manual labels are read from edited sample markdown bullets or from sample JSON manual_labels/labels objects.
Blank labels remain unlabeled and are excluded from precision denominators.
Recall is unknown unless a separate gold false-negative denominator is supplied; sampled positives only estimate precision.

review_method.claim_scope: Sampled precision estimate for labeled relations in the compact proof DB; recall and absent-relation precision are not claimed.
review_method.unsupported_policy: Unsupported patterns are separated from false positives; absent proof-mode relations receive no precision claim.
